backend/main.mo: Main backend actor defining product catalog, cart, orders, and user profile management with role-based access control (admin/user permissions) and CRUD operations for products, orders, and inventory.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including product management page, inventory controls, CRUD operations, orders dashboard, and navigation links with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and styling for the e-commerce application with admin panel and public catalog.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives defining design tokens for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space with modern blue palette and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading the React application titled 'Product Showcase'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component configuring TanStack Router with routes for public catalog, checkout, orders, and admin-protected routes (products, orders management) wrapped in layout with header/footer and theme/language providers.
Button component for adding products to cart with authentication check, out-of-stock handling, loading states, and internationalization support.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Authorization wrapper component that verifies user authentication and admin privileges, displaying appropriate loading, login required, or access denied messages.
frontend/src/components/CartDrawer.tsx: A slide-out drawer component displaying cart items with quantity controls, remove buttons, and checkout functionality. Includes empty state, loading state, and calculates total price with currency formatting based on language.
frontend/src/components/CategoryBadge.ts: Displays a colored badge for product categories with localized labels. Maps ProductCategory enum values to translated labels and color classes.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: A horizontal filter bar with buttons for selecting product categories or viewing all products. Highlights the currently selected category and provides localized labels.
frontend/src/components/DeleteProductDia: A confirmation dialog for deleting products with loading state and error handling. Uses AlertDialog component and triggers product deletion mutation on confirmation.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Application footer displaying copyright information and a branded link to caffeine.ai with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Main navigation header with responsive design, showing logo, navigation links (My Orders, Admin Panel, Product Management), cart button with item count, language toggle, and login button. Includes mobile navigation integration.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggle.t: A button component that toggles between English and Nepali languages, displaying the current language name and a globe icon.
Provides skeleton loading components for product cards and product grids, displaying placeholder UI while content loads.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Handles Internet Identity authentication with login/logout functionality, loading states, and error handling. Clears query cache on logout and retries login if user is already authenticated.
frontend/src/components/MobileNav.tsx: Mobile navigation menu with hamburger toggle, displaying navigation links (Products, My Orders, Admin sections) and authentication controls. Includes backdrop overlay and slide-down animation.
frontend/src/components/OrderStatusBadge: Displays a colored badge for order status (pending, processing, shipped, delivered) with localized labels and status-specific colors.
frontend/src/components/PageTransition.t: A wrapper component that applies fade-in animation to page content during route transitions.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a single product with image, name, description, price, stock status, category badge, and either an add-to-cart button (authenticated) or WhatsApp contact button (unauthenticated).
frontend/src/components/ProductGrid.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of ProductCard components or shows a message when no products are available.
frontend/src/components/ProductSearch.ts: Provides a search input with debounced query callback (300ms delay) and clear button functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts authenticated users without a profile to enter name, phone, address, and city details.
frontend/src/components/StockAdjustmentC: Admin controls for adjusting product stock with increment/decrement buttons and direct numeric input, calling the backend update mutation.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Button that opens WhatsApp with a pre-filled message for the given product and phone number.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: React context providing language toggle (English/Nepali) and translation function with localStorage persistence; includes comprehensive translation dictionary.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches the backend actor with optional identity authentication, initializes admin access control, and invalidates dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddToCart.ts: Mutation hook for adding items to cart, invalidates cart queries on success and shows toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useAllOrders.ts: Query hook that fetches all orders from the backend (admin function).
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Query hook that fetches the current user's cart items, enabled only when authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useCheckout.ts: Mutation hook for checkout process with shipping details, invalidates cart, orders, and products queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateProduct.ts: Mutation hook for creating a new product with all required fields including image, category, and stock.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteProduct.ts: Mutation hook for deleting a product by ID, invalidates products queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Query hook that fetches the authenticated user's profile, returns null if no profile exists, enabled only when authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsAdmin.ts: Custom hook that queries the backend to check if the current authenticated user has admin privileges.
frontend/src/hooks/useLowStockProducts.t: React Query hook that fetches products with stock levels below a specified threshold.
frontend/src/hooks/useOrder.ts: React Query hook that fetches a single order by its ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useOrdersByStatus.ts: React Query hook that fetches all orders filtered by a specific OrderStatus.
frontend/src/hooks/useProduct.ts: React Query hook that fetches a single product by its ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useProducts.ts: React Query hook that fetches all products from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemoveFromCart.ts: React Query mutation hook that removes a product from the cart and invalidates cart queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the current user's profile and invalidates the user profile query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useUpdateCartQuantity: React Query mutation hook that updates the quantity of a product in the cart and invalidates cart queries on success.
React Query mutation hook that updates an order's status and invalidates related order queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useUpdateProduct.ts: React Query mutation hook that updates product details (name, description, price, image, WhatsApp, category, stock) and invalidates product queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useUpdateStock.ts: React Query mutation hook that updates a product's stock level and invalidates product and low-stock queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserOrders.ts: React Query hook that fetches all orders for the currently authenticated user.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind configuration, custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors, typography styles, and custom animations for UI transitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminOrderDetails.tsx: Admin page for viewing detailed order information and updating order status with customer details, items, and delivery information.
frontend/src/pages/AdminOrders.tsx: Admin page displaying all orders with filtering by status, showing order summaries with customer info and navigation to order details.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page for managing products with a table view, low stock alerts, and actions to create, edit, or delete products. Includes navigation to order management and displays product details with category badges.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page that collects shipping details (name, phone, address, city) and displays cart summary with total. Submits order via useCheckout hook and redirects to order confirmation.
frontend/src/pages/CreateProduct.tsx: Form page for creating new products with fields for name, description, price, WhatsApp number, category, stock, and image upload. Handles image preview and upload progress before submitting to backend.
frontend/src/pages/EditProduct.tsx: Form page for editing existing products that pre-populates fields from fetched product data. Allows updating all product fields including optional image replacement with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/MyOrders.tsx: User order history page displaying a list of orders with status badges, item counts, and totals. Each order is clickable to view details, with empty state prompting users to start shopping.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Order success page showing confirmation message with order ID, estimated delivery time, and action buttons to view order details or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/OrderDetails.tsx: Displays detailed information about a specific order including order ID, total, shipping details (name, phone, address), and ordered items with images and quantities. Uses React Router for navigation and includes loading/error states with responsive layout.
frontend/src/pages/ProductManagement.tsx: Admin page for managing products with a table view showing product images, names, descriptions, prices, categories, and stock levels. Includes controls for adding new products, editing existing ones, adjusting stock, and deleting products.
frontend/src/pages/PublicCatalog.tsx: Public-facing product catalog page with hero banner, search functionality, category filtering, and product grid display. Implements memoized filtering logic and responsive design with loading skeletons and empty states.
frontend/src/translations/translations.t: Empty translation file kept for reference; actual translations are now managed in LanguageContext for better performance.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, custom shadows, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file for an e-commerce admin system with product management (CRUD, inventory adjustment) and real-time order tracking. Uses Motoko backend, React/TypeScript frontend with Tailwind CSS, and Internet Identity authentication.
